name: Auditing Services Changed on Compliance Host
notes: Auditing services were changed on a compliance host.  Before enabling this rule be sure to define the hosts in the compliance definition building blocks and verify the events for audit service changed for your host are in the BB:CategoryDefinition: Auditing Changed building block.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:ComplianceDefinition: GLBA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: HIPAA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: PCI DSS Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: SOX Servers
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Auditing Changed
TD_list: APPLY Auditing Services Changed on Compliance Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:ComplianceDefinition: GLBA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: HIPAA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: PCI DSS Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: SOX Servers
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Auditing Changed
RED_list: Event name: Auditing Services Changed on Compliance Host
Event description: A required audit service was changed on a host that falls under a compliance regulation.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Log Source
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
